component.name: GTimer
component.summary: Track time spent on tasks and projects

description.p: GTimer is a lightweight time tracking application for the GNOME desktop. It allows you to manage multiple tasks, group them into projects, and track your daily and total time spent on each.

ul.li: Support for multiple projects and tasks

screenshot.caption: Main window with task list showing projects, tasks, and time tracking
Generate customizable reports with multiple format and time range options
Edit tasks and assign them to projects for better organization
View generated time reports with detailed breakdown by task and project

description.p: Complete rewrite with GTK 4 and Libadwaita
